name: skillkill
description: Audit and clean up stale local agent skills.

scripts.check: node --check bin/skillkill.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/interactive.js && node --check src/omit.js && node --check packages/skill-cleanup/bin/skill-cleanup.js && node --check packages/skill-prune/bin/skill-prune.js
scripts.build: npm pack --dry-run && npm pack ./packages/skill-cleanup --dry-run && npm pack ./packages/skill-prune --dry-run
